hooks.command: file_path=$(cat | /usr/bin/jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file_path // empty') && if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'middleware\.ts'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not create src/middleware.ts — Next.js 16 uses src/proxy.ts instead. Edit proxy.ts for request handling (auth, i18n, redirects). See CLAUDE.md Known Gotchas.' >&2; exit 2; fi
